backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that stores GPS unit packet reports in a map, supporting upsert, single-record lookup, and full listing operations. Uses a migration hook and defines ReportEntry with fields including storedPktCount and normalPktCount.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old ReportEntry records (missing storedPktCount) to new ones by adding a default storedPktCount of 0, used by the main actor's with-migration clause.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a fix to the CSV parser so it correctly counts 'Stored' PktState rows and maps them to the storedPkts field instead of defaulting to 0.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering hooks, components, pages, utilities, and config files for the GPS Packet Tracker app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the GPS Packet Tracker app that loads SheetJS via CDN for XLS/XLSX support and mounts the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (dashboard, data entry, report) wrapped in a shared Layout, plus a Sonner toast provider.
frontend/src/components/CSVImportSection: File import component that parses uploaded CSV/XLS/XLSX files and upserts each row to the backend, passing both storedPkts (count of 'Stored' state rows) and normalPkts from the parsed data. Includes error handling for IC canister-stopped errors.
frontend/src/components/DataEntryForm.ts: Manual bulk data entry form with per-row validation that submits unit packet data (including storedPkts and normalPkts) to the backend via the upsertReport mutation.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with logo and navigation links, a main content area, and a footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ModelSummaryCard: Displays a summary card for a specific GPS unit model showing unit count, total/stored/valid GPS packets, and percentage metrics with model-specific color theming.
frontend/src/components/ReportFilters.ts: Renders filter controls (week, model, unit ID) for the report page and provides a CSV export function that downloads filtered report entries with totals.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyReportTabl: Renders a sortable table of report entries with packet counts and GPS fix percentages, including a totals footer row and color-coded GPS fix badges.
frontend/src/components/WeekNavigator.ts: A week navigation UI component with previous/next buttons and a display label, constrained to available weeks when provided.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating GPS report entries, along with ISO week label utilities and model label constants.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines a dark navy/amber OKLCH CSS variable theme, custom scrollbar styles, and reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page that displays weekly GPS unit performance stats (total units, packets, GPS fix rate) and per-model summary cards, with week navigation and filtering of valid report entries.
frontend/src/pages/DataEntryPage.tsx: Data entry page providing both a CSV import section and a manual DataEntryForm for submitting weekly GPS packet data, with instructional UI elements.
frontend/src/pages/ReportPage.tsx: Report page that fetches all reports, filters by week/model/unit ID, and renders a WeeklyReportTable with ReportFilters controls, auto-selecting the most recent available week.
frontend/src/utils/csvParser.ts: Waggle portal CSV/XLS/XLSX parser that extracts packet data rows (including totalPkts, storedPkts, validGpsFixPkts, etc.) and metadata, always deriving the unit ID exclusively from the filename stem rather than file content.
frontend/src/utils/reportFilters.ts: Utility that defines a set of known invalid unit IDs (e.g. battery/signal state strings) and exports functions to validate and filter ReportEntry arrays by unit ID.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based color palettes (navy, amber, semantic tokens), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the GPS Packet Tracker app, noting a known bug where stored packet count shows as 0 instead of the correct value from the PktState column, and a pending backend task to persist storedPktCount separately.
